query:
SELECT 
  id,
  status,
  startedAt,
  completedAt,
  ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(completedAt) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(startedAt)) / 60, 1) AS durationMinutes,
  currentStep,
  lastActivityNote,
  articlesIngested,
  projectsCreated,
  contactsEnriched,
  triggeredBy
FROM pipelineRuns
WHERE id = 1590001;
